title: Who is Viktor Orbán, Hungarian PM fighting to stay in power after 16 years?
summary_full: Since 2010, Orbán has transformed Hungary into what the European Parliament has denounced as a "hybrid regime of electoral autocracy".
summary_public: Since 2010, Orbán has transformed Hungary into what the European Parliament has denounced as a "hybrid regime of electoral autocracy".

HU.label: negative
